lesson.story_mission: Join the Skill World studio to master find area of triangles, quadrilaterals, and polygons; use nets for surface area; find volume of rectangular prisms.
lesson.objective: find area of triangles, quadrilaterals, and polygons; use nets for surface area; find volume of rectangular prisms
lesson.concept_explanation: This mission teaches find area of triangles, quadrilaterals, and polygons; use nets for surface area; find volume of rectangular prisms with models, labels, context, and careful answer checks.
lesson.common_misconception: A common mistake is using a number without checking what the labels and units mean.
lesson.real_world_connection: These skills help solve design, science, sports, and community data problems.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read the model, choose the correct measure or statistic, calculate carefully, and interpret the answer in context.
